name: Deploy to production (branch-restricted)

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - production

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production

    steps:
      # 1️⃣ Checkout repo
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      # 2️⃣ Generate version tag
      - name: Generate version tag
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION="v$(date +'%Y.%m.%d.%H%M%S')"
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "Generated version: $VERSION"

      # 3️⃣ Set up Docker Buildx
      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      # 4️⃣ Login to Docker Hub
      - name: Login to Docker Hub
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          username: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}

      # 5️⃣ Build and push Docker image
      - name: Build and push Docker image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: .
          push: true
          tags: |
            ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}/business-tracker-api:${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
            ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}/business-tracker-api:latest
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

      # 6️⃣ Configure AWS CLI for IAM user
      - name: Configure AWS CLI
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v2
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          aws-region: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}

      # 7️⃣ Deploy to EC2 via SSM
      - name: Deploy to AWS EC2 via SSM
        run: |
          INSTANCE_ID="${{ secrets.EC2_INSTANCE_ID }}"
          DOCUMENT_NAME="AWS-RunShellScript"

          echo "Sending deployment commands via SSM..."
          aws ssm send-command \
            --targets "Key=instanceIds,Values=$INSTANCE_ID" \
            --document-name "$DOCUMENT_NAME" \
            --comment "GitHub Actions Docker Deployment" \
            --parameters 'commands=[
              "docker pull ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}/business-tracker-api:latest",
              "docker stop business-tracker-api || true",
              "docker rm business-tracker-api || true",
              "docker run -d --name business-tracker-api \
                -e DATABASE_URL=\"${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}\" \
                -e SUPABASE_JWT_KEY=\"${{ secrets.SUPABASE_JWT_KEY }}\" \
                -e REDIS_URL=\"${{ secrets.REDIS_URL }}\" \
                -e OPENROUTER_API_KEY=\"${{ secrets.OPENROUTER_API_KEY }}\" \
                -e REDIS_TOKEN=\"${{ secrets.REDIS_TOKEN }}\" \
                -e CACHE_TTL_SECONDS=\"${{ secrets.CACHE_TTL_SECONDS }}\" \
                -p 3003:3000 --restart always \
                ${{ secrets.DOCKER_USERNAME }}/business-tracker-api:latest"
            ]' \
            --region ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}
